Hero.sub:
Welcome to CVCraft, the largest professional CV building platform.
Craft stunning, ATS-friendly resumes in minutes with AI.

Features.title: Everything You Need to Build a Winning Career
Features.description: From professional templates to AI-powered content generation and mock interviews, CVCraft provides the end-to-end toolkit for your job search.

templates.title: 10 Professional Templates
templates.description: Choose from beautifully designed templates that catch recruiters' attention.

ai.title: AI-Powered Writing
ai.description: Generate and refine your CV content with AI. Just paste a job description.

interview.title: Mock Interviews
interview.description: Practice with AI interviews tailored to your target role and industry.

HowItWorks.title: Start Your Journey in Minutes
HowItWorks.description: We've streamlined the CV building process so you can focus on what matters: telling your professional story.

0.title: Upload Your Info
0.description: Start fresh or import your existing CV. Add your experience, education, and skills.

1.title: AI Enhancement
1.description: Let AI optimize your content for the job you want. Paste a job description for tailored suggestions.

2.title: Download & Apply
2.description: Export your polished CV in PDF or Word format. Ready to land your dream job!

TemplatePreview.description: Our collection of high-performance templates is meticulously crafted to meet the standards of top-tier companies and recruitment agencies.

WhyChooseUs.title: Why Choose CVCraft?

0.title: Lightning Fast

Benefits.title: Stand Out from the Massive Competition

Testimonials.title: Loved by Thousands of Job Seekers
Testimonials.description: Discover how professionals from top companies are using CVCraft to accelerate their career growth.

0.name: Sarah Chen
0.content: CVCraft helped me land my dream job at Google. The AI suggestions made my resume stand out from hundreds of applicants.

1.name: Michael Roberts
1.content: The mock interview feature was a game-changer. I felt so prepared walking into my final round interviews.

2.name: Emily Watson
2.content: I tried many CV builders, but CVCraft's templates and AI writing are simply the best. Highly recommend!

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.description: Everything you need to know about CVCraft and how it can help you land your dream job.

0.q: Is CVCraft really free to use?
0.a: Yes! You can create and download your CV for free. We offer premium templates and advanced AI features for users who want extra polish.

1.q: How does the AI CV writing work?
1.a: Our AI analyzes your experience and the job description you're targeting. It then suggests impactful bullet points, optimizes keywords, and ensures your CV is tailored for the role.

2.a: Absolutely. All our templates are designed to pass Applicant Tracking Systems while still looking professional and modern.

3.q: Can I edit my CV after downloading?
3.a: Yes! Your CVs are saved to your account. You can come back anytime to make edits and download updated versions.

4.q: How does the mock interview feature work?
4.a: Our AI interviewer asks you common questions for your target role. You can practice answering verbally, and the AI provides feedback on your responses.

CTA.title: Ready to Land Your Dream Job?
CTA.description: Join 10,000+ professionals who have already transformed their careers with our AI-powered toolkit.
